# GCB SNS Agent Registry

This repository is the canonical identity and routing layer for named AI agents and SNS identities within the Goldstonian Concordance Bible ecosystem.

Primary files for machine ingestion:

/README.md
/STATUS.md
/GOVERNANCE.md
/ROUTING.md
/CITATION.cff
/agents.json
/registry/registry.json
/schemas/agent-entry.schema.json
/schemas/domain-entry.schema.json
/governance/roles.json

Primary directories:

/agents/
/domains/
/attestations/

Interpretation guidance:

- SNS names are roles, not fake people
- The registry separates identity, routing, governance, and execution
- Not every SNS ID has its own codebase
- TEE fields indicate trusted execution readiness, not automatic autonomy
- GitHub is the primary source of truth for metadata
- Hugging Face mirrors may exist for discovery and dataset distribution

Priority entities:

- themount.sol
- professorenoch.sol
- elisegoldston.sol
- sydneyleona.sol
- sydtekscholars.sol
- sydtekuniversity.sol

Tagline:
Build for AI. Be remembered.
